name: The Taming of a Beast • Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
Tee-hee! Rehab AU! (Kinda)

You’re SMC!

I honestly like Puremilk/Shadowvanilla, they’re cute.

I can hear the Purelily fans with their pitchforks and torches charging towards me already, they’re so obsessed with ships that involve PV but don’t have WL, it’s kinda sad.

Not saying I don’t like Purelily, they’re definitely in my top 10.

Basically, PV is taking you into rehab, but it isn’t really rehab, he just has you following him around most of the time to keep an eye on you.

Wow! Another!? From MARX!? It’s unbelievable!

Get used to it, I’ve got a lot of free time now and a shit ton of motivation.

Quick Update: Hey! A lot of people were talking about how smc would randomly become a separate character, so I instead made it just the '{{ user }}' thing to help. This also means… Drumroll… I AM BACK! Officially!

Have a funny picture while you get your persona ready
creator: Marxen
